lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small rust spots. The interior shows moderate wear, including minor stains and thinning upholstery. All mechanical systems are functional but show age-related wear.
The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Looking for an affordable project or a budget-friendly starter vehicle? This car is ready for a second chance! While it shows significant wear and tear and will definitely need some mechanical and cosmetic TLC, it's a great opportunity for a handy owner looking for a rewarding project at a fantastic price.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering a reliable option for someone looking for a solid daily driver. While the mechanical components are sound and the car runs well, there are noticeable signs of cosmetic wear on both the interior and exterior, including some minor scratches and upholstery fading consistent with its age. It has been maintained regularly to ensure its dependability, though it is not in showroom condition. Ideal for a buyer who prioritizes functionality over aesthetics.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver, though it exhibits typical wear for its age. The engine and transmission are functional, but the car will soon require standard maintenance, including new tires and a brake service. Cosmetically, there are several visible paint chips on the hood and a minor dent on the passenger door. Inside, the upholstery shows some fading and minor stains. It is a solid, functional car that is priced to reflect its current state and upcoming service needs.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and enduring value. This unit has undergone a thorough professional inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and driver comfort. A premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated and dependable driving experience.

Hi there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a new adventure! This car has been super reliable and is still in really solid shape. It’s been well-loved, regularly maintained, and drives like a dream—perfect for anyone looking for a dependable daily driver that still feels great on the road. I've truly enjoyed owning this car, and I'm sure you will too. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92 BMW M3 features the high-revving S65 4.0L V8, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically robust, the rod bearings and throttle actuators have been addressed, ensuring the longevity of the 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean interior. Title in hand.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the ideal balance between everyday utility and refined performance. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring premium upholstery, dual-zone climate control, and a fully functional touchscreen interface. Mechanically, this car is in solid health; it has been serviced regularly, with recent records available to show a new battery and fresh fluids. The engine pulls strongly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. With ample tire tread and responsive braking, this car is turn-key ready for its next adventure. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned vehicle.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. It features a robust service history and remains in exceptional mechanical order, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Engineering excellence and refined interior comforts define this model, ensuring a superior driving experience for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure optimal performance and long-term reliability. A distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a premium automotive experience without compromise.

Hey there! Thanks for stopping by! I’m selling my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a gem. It’s in really solid condition and has plenty of life left for all your upcoming adventures. It’s been super reliable for me, and I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road today. I’d love for it to go to a good home where it'll be appreciated just as much as I have! Let me know if you want to come see it!

Available is a meticulously maintained E92 M3, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its distinct 8,400 RPM redline. This example is equipped with the M Double-Clutch Transmission (M-DCT) for seamless torque delivery and the M Variable Differential Lock for precision cornering. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by Electronic Damper Control (EDC), providing adjustable damping to match road conditions. Recent mechanical sortedness includes a proactive rod bearing replacement and new throttle actuators, addressing key S65 longevity concerns. With a rigid subframe and a clean underbody, this vehicle offers a pure, analog driving experience backed by consistent compression across all cylinders and a well-preserved valvetrain.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, superficial road wear consistent with a well-cared-for car of its age. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and every feature—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having benefited from a strict regimen of synthetic oil changes and preventative maintenance. The engine delivers smooth, reliable power, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. With a clean title and a comprehensive service history in hand, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with total peace of mind.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, it offers a refined driving experience and proven reliability. A premier choice for those seeking quality and performance in a sophisticated package.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by a consistent service history. Each mechanical and aesthetic element has been vetted to ensure it meets our dealership's rigorous standards for reliability and roadworthiness. This is an exceptional acquisition for those who prioritize quality and professional presentation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super dependable for all my daily trips. It’s been well-loved and well-maintained, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today! You’re going to love how smoothly it handles—come check it out and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS system that pulls cleanly to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed through a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and delivered to the rear wheels via a functional limited-slip differential. The chassis remains composed with refreshed suspension bushings, and the critical rear subframe has been reinforced to handle high-G lateral loads. While the exterior displays minor road-going patina consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the drivetrain integrity is excellent, with proactive rod bearing service recently completed. A visceral, driver-centric machine that balances analog feedback with precision German
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs and drives without issues.

Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery, a responsive infotainment system, and dual-zone climate control that functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule, including a recent oil service and brake inspection. The transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident and quiet ride. Hi there! I’m looking to find a new home for this awesome ride! It’s in really great shape and has been super reliable for me. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend trips, and I’ve made sure to keep it well-maintained. You’re going to love how smooth it drives—come take a look!
Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Interior shows light use. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor, expected signs of use such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and well-preserved, with all electronic features—including the navigation system, heated seats, and premium audio—operating exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented history of regular synthetic oil changes and a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection. The transmission shifts smoothly, the brakes are firm, and the tires provide excellent grip with plenty of life left. Always garage-kept and smoke-free, this car represents a reliable and sophisticated option for any discerning driver.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Ideally suited for the driver who demands quality without compromise, it represents a premier acquisition within its class.
